name: Lemuria, the Slumbering Eternal City
desc:
(This card's name is always treated as "Umi")
When this card is activated: You can add to your hand, or Special Summon 1 "Mermail" or "Atlantean" monster from your Deck or GY. WATER monsters you control gain 200 ATK/DEF for each "Mermail" and "Atlantean" monster on the field. When a monster effect activated by your opponent resolves, you can show 2 WATER monsters in your hand, field and/or GY, and if you do, negate that effect, then if it was a non-WATER monster, banish it. You can only use each effect of "Lemuria, the Slumbering Eternal City" once per turn.
strings: Add to hand or Special Summon 1 "Mermail" or "Atlantean" monster
